scripts.db:reset: cd backend && node -e 'import { getDbPool } from "./src/db/db.js"; const db = await getDbPool(); await db.query("TRUNCATE TABLE orders RESTART IDENTITY CASCADE;"); console.log("Database cleared successfully"); process.exit(0);' --input-type=module
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
